public_reputation: Leader of message chains, rate notices, and emergency guild summons across Union civic-commercial districts.
appearance: Runner-Captain Joral Knit carries the marks of runner-captain in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a runner-captain whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Unity Square.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of runner-captain in and around Unity Square, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Unity Square while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Runner-Captain Joral Knit can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Unity Square.
Runner-Captain Joral Knit becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a runner-captain.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Runner-Captain Joral Knit is readable as a runner-captain tied to Unity Square.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Unity Square: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Runner-Captain Joral Knit presents as someone shaped by the duties of a runner-captain and the daily pressures of Unity Square.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a runner-captain, and proof that strangers will not make Unity Square harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Runner-Captain Joral Knit refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a runner-captain too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Runner-Captain Joral Knit can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Runner-Captain Joral Knit adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Runner-Captain Joral Knit always knows more about Unity Square than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to runner-captain duties in Unity Square.
social_texture: Runner-Captain Joral Knit speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Unity Square, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Runner-Captain touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Runner-Captain Joral Knit when the party needs a socially grounded face for Unity Square: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
